summary: Reviewed 9 frontpage concepts (1301-1309), 50 logo options (1101-1150), and the live BrandMark component. The homepage hero structure is typographically clean and the parchment palette is correct, but the right-side illustrations do not read as anatomical plates ΓÇö they are abstract topographic blobs. The logo batch is almost entirely color-variation exhaustion of two mark types (NEURAL ARC and HEARTLINE), producing no new mark geometry. BrandMark.tsx is a dead `` tag with no live SVG mark at all. The system is not yet premium medical illustration; it is still symbolic medical vector art with editorial typography layered on top.
recommendations: PROMOTE 1302 (Coronary Continuum) to primary hero candidate ΓÇö it is the only frontpage with two distinct anatomical layers (cardiac silhouette + ECG waveform overlay), which is the closest thing to a literal, readable medical subject in the batch. Kill all cortical-atlas variants that use the plain topographic-blob form (1301, 1303, 1305, 1307, 1309) as hero candidates until the illustration is redrawn with actual gyri asymmetry and 3-4 labeled structures.

Redraw the right-panel anatomical mark with three literal refinements: (1) break the perfect bilateral symmetry of the contour lines ΓÇö real anatomy is asymmetric; (2) add 3ΓÇô4 small serif annotations (e.g., 'ant. sulcus', 'lat. fissure') in 9ΓÇô11px Source Serif 4 italic with leader lines at 0.7px; (3) add a plate number ('Pl. XIV') in the lower-right corner of the illustration zone. These three moves shift the read from 'AI startup blob' to 'anatomical press plate' without rebuilding the full SVG.

Kill the NEURAL ARC mark direction entirely for the next batch. The arc (two endpoint dots + single bezier) has no anatomical content and reads as punctuation. HEARTLINE (1101) is the only mark in 1101ΓÇô1150 with genuine anatomy: cardiac outline + ECG. Derive the next 10 logo options exclusively from the HEARTLINE geometry ΓÇö increase the cardiac outline stroke fidelity (add aortic arch bump, asymmetric left-ventricle curve), vary the ECG waveform from sine to a real PQRST, and test three scale relationships: mark-only, mark+wordmark stacked, mark+wordmark inline.

Fix BrandMark.tsx: replace the static `` with an inline SVG that renders the chosen mark. A PNG logo cannot be color-themed, scaled crisply at all breakpoints, or animated. This is a 30-minute refactor that unblocks every future brand system update.

skills: SVG mark extraction from design review batch
durable_memory: Hero illustration: all 1301-1309 frontpages share identical layout template; differentiation is copy + right-panel illustration only
Right-panel illustration types confirmed: cortical-atlas (abstract topographic blob, majority) and coronary-continuum (cardiac two-lobe + ECG waveform, 1302 only)
Logo batch 1101-1150 is dominated by NEURAL ARC (color/weight variations, ~48 files) + one HEARTLINE type (1101); no new mark geometry introduced
BrandMark.tsx renders only a static PNG ΓÇö no live SVG mark in the codebase
Premium anatomical direction requires: real anatomical asymmetry, serif plate annotations, plate numbering, hatching fills ΓÇö none present yet
HEARTLINE (1101) with cardiac outline + ECG is the only mark with genuine anatomical content; teal (#5A7F88) and gold (#C59B5E) are the strongest color pairings for the parchment ground
active_context: Current sprint: push hero + logo toward literal premium medical illustration
Strongest logos (least wrong): 1101 (HEARTLINE teal), 1110 (NEURAL ARC gold), 1135 (NEURAL ARC clay)
Next action: redraw 1302 illustration with plate annotations + derive next logo batch from HEARTLINE geometry only

current_blocker: The source files for AmbientEditorialHero.tsx and AnatomyGlobeVisual.tsx were not found at the declared paths (likely not yet created or path mismatch). Code-side hero system cannot be audited or modified until those files exist. BrandMark.tsx exists but uses a static PNG, blocking all SVG-based brand work.
suggested_human_fix: 1) Confirm or create AmbientEditorialHero.tsx and AnatomyGlobeVisual.tsx ΓÇö check if they live under a different path or have not been scaffolded yet. 2) Replace BrandMark.tsx `` with an inline SVG of the HEARTLINE mark ΓÇö extract the heart+ECG paths from chapai-option-1101.svg, drop them inline, and size with viewBox. This is the single highest-leverage 30-minute action in the system right now.
next_task: Generate HEARTLINE logo batch 1151-1160: 10 variants derived exclusively from the cardiac outline + PQRST waveform geometry in 1101. Vary (a) cardiac outline fidelity (add aortic arch, left-ventricle asymmetry), (b) ECG wave type (sine vs real PQRST), (c) mark-to-wordmark scale ratio. Use only teal (#5A7F88), gold (#C59B5E), and near-black (#1F1F21) on parchment (#FBF7F0). Kill all new NEURAL ARC generation.
